layers.name: Core
layers.description: Application support classes, providers, policies, notifications, rules, and shared traits

layers.name: Configuration
layers.description: Application, package, test, and build configuration

layers.name: Documentation
layers.description: Project documentation, policies, and onboarding references

layers.name: Workflows
layers.description: Commands, jobs, imports, exports, and application actions

layers.name: Integrations
layers.description: Market data providers, AI agents, and external service adapters

layers.name: HTTP/API
layers.description: Routes, controllers, requests, resources, and web/API entry points

layers.name: UI

layers.name: Data
layers.description: Eloquent models, migrations, seeders, factories, and persistence concerns

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the README and core manifests to understand Investbrain as a Laravel investment tracker and self-hosted application.

tour.title: HTTP Entry Points
tour.description: Follow the web and API route files into controllers and resources to see how requests enter the Laravel backend.

tour.title: Data Model
tour.description: Review the Eloquent models and database migrations that represent portfolios, holdings, transactions, dividends, currencies, and users.

tour.title: Portfolio Workflows
tour.description: Explore commands, jobs, imports, exports, and actions that synchronize market data, process imports, and maintain portfolio state.

tour.title: Integrations
tour.description: Inspect the market data provider interfaces and AI agents that connect Investbrain to external data and chat capabilities.

tour.title: User Interface
tour.description: Walk through Blade, Livewire, frontend assets, localization, and public resources that shape the user-facing experience.

tour.title: Verification and Operations
tour.description: Finish with tests, Docker assets, CI workflows, and configuration that support local development and deployment.
